battleTraits.name: Storm Charge
battleTraits.summary: Pick a unit not in combat; it may use Charge abilities this turn even if it used a Run ability.
battleTraits.timing: Once per battle, Your Charge Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat.
battleTraits.effect: That unit can use Charge abilities this turn even if it used a Run ability in the same turn.

battleTraits.name: Shield of Azyr
battleTraits.summary: Pick a friendly unit; it has Ward (5+) until the start of your next turn.
battleTraits.timing: Once per battle, Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.effect: Until the start of your next turn, that unit has Ward (5+).

abilities.name: Deliver Judgement
abilities.flavor: This warrior orders Sigmar's wrath to be delivered unto their enemies.
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly non-Hero unit wholly within 12" of this unit.
abilities.effect: The target can use 2 Fight abilities this phase. After the first is used, the target has Strike-last for the rest of the phase.

abilities.name: Plan the Attack
abilities.flavor: With honed tactical skill, the Lord-Vigilant orders a vital position to be taken.
abilities.declare: Pick an objective you do not control.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly units targeting enemies contesting that objective.

abilities.name: Cleansing Fires
abilities.flavor: A torrent of holy fire engulfs the enemy.
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12", then make a chanting roll of D6.
abilities.effect: On a 3+, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Sense Unholy Sorcery
abilities.flavor: Gryph-crows alert their master when unholy energies are nearby.
abilities.effect: This unit's Gryph-crow is a token. The unit has Ward (5+) while its Gryph-crow is on the battlefield. If you roll an unmodified 1 on a ward roll, remove the Gryph-crow.

abilities.name: Heralds of Righteousness
abilities.flavor: Prosecutors speed across the battlefield in blurs of light.
abilities.effect: When you make a charge roll for this unit, roll 1 additional dice.

abilities.name: Stalwart Defenders
abilities.flavor: Liberators fiercely guard lands brought into Sigmar's domain.
abilities.effect: Add 3 to this unit's control score while it contests an objective wholly within friendly territory.

abilities.name: Skirmishers
abilities.effect: This unit has a coherency range of 2".
